findings.observation: The audit-page-a11y tool provides a WCAG-oriented report checking contrast, alt text, heading hierarchy, link text, and form labels. Contrast resolution is described as 'best-effort,' indicating it is inconclusive when the background cannot be resolved.
findings.recommendation: Expose the logic used for background resolution in 'best-effort' contrast checks to allow auditing the accuracy of the automated findings. Consider server-side axe integration.

findings.observation: Proposed item not currently implemented in the analyzed classes.
findings.recommendation: Implement automated tests for tab order, focus-visible states, and skip-link presence using Playwright keyboard navigation API.

findings.observation: Proposed item not currently implemented in the analyzed classes.
findings.recommendation: Add a validation layer for ARIA roles, aria-labels, aria-describedby, and live-regions to ensure screen-reader compatibility.

findings.observation: V4_Color_Contrast implements WCAG 2.1 relative-luminance and contrast-ratio definitions, not 2.2. Constants AA_NORMAL, AA_LARGE, AAA_NORMAL, AAA_LARGE present but 2.2-specific rules missing.
findings.recommendation: Update implementation to support WCAG 2.2 standards if required. Also add UI diff capability for fix-color-contrast (apply:true) to show before/after.
